trending_posts.author: @guildford_foodie
trending_posts.content: The new Iced Caramel Latte at @CostaCoffee Guildford is absolutely STUNNING ☕✨ Tried it this morning and it honestly made my commute. #CostaCoffee #IcedLatte #GuildfordEats
trending_posts.opportunity: Influencer post going viral. Consider reaching out to offer a collaboration or complimentary tasting.

trending_posts.author: @surrey_sips
trending_posts.content: POV: you discover Costa Guildford does the BEST latte art in Surrey 🎨 Watch this barista! #CostaCoffee #BaristaLife #LatteArt
trending_posts.opportunity: Viral barista art video – 5.6k likes. Great brand moment. Share internally with team to celebrate.

trending_posts.author: @commuter_dave
trending_posts.content: Waited 12 minutes for a flat white at Costa Guildford this morning. Lovely coffee but the queue was out the door – need more staff! @CostaCoffee
trending_posts.opportunity: Queue complaint during morning rush. Likely linked to today's rail disruption. Respond promptly and acknowledge.

trending_posts.author: Sarah M.
trending_posts.content: Always my go-to before work. Staff are so friendly and the coffee is always perfect. The new seasonal menu is fab! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐

trending_posts.author: James T.
trending_posts.content: Ordered oat milk and got regular milk. Told staff and they were apologetic and remade it, so good recovery – but should have been right first time.
trending_posts.opportunity: Allergen/milk preference error. Worth reviewing at team huddle and reinforcing correct milk labelling at the bar.

alerts.title: Queue complaint during morning rush
alerts.description: Customer complaint about 12-minute wait – likely linked to today's rail disruption increasing footfall. Consider social media response.
alerts.suggested_response: Hi @commuter_dave – really sorry for the wait this morning! We had an unexpectedly busy rush and are doing our best to get everyone served quickly. Hope we can make it up to you ☕

alerts.title: Milk allergy near-miss mentioned publicly
alerts.description: Customer noted they received wrong milk type. Good recovery by staff but warrants internal review.

trending_posts.author: @guildfordcommuter
trending_posts.content: Absolute chaos at Guildford station. Train delayed, queue at Costa goes back to the barriers. Still worth it for the coffee though! @CostaCoffee #SWR #Delays
trending_posts.opportunity: Live situation today. Acknowledge the disruption and thank customers for their patience.

trending_posts.author: @frustrated_commuter_99
trending_posts.content: 45 min queue at @CostaCoffee Guildford station this morning. Trains are broken AND the coffee shop can't cope. Not ideal guys.
trending_posts.opportunity: Needs urgent response. Acknowledge situation, explain the exceptional volume.

alerts.title: Multiple negative queue-length complaints – live today
alerts.description: At least 3 posts today about extreme queue length due to rail disruption. Immediate social response recommended.
alerts.suggested_response: Hi – we're really sorry for the long wait today. Like many of you, we've been caught out by the rail delays bringing in an exceptional number of customers. Our team are working flat out – thank you so much for your patience ☕❤️

trending_posts.author: @readingfoodie
trending_posts.content: We tried EVERY drink on the new Costa spring menu so you don't have to ☕🌸 Reading Oracle is where it's AT. Which one should I try next? #CostaCoffee #SpringMenu #ReadingUK
trending_posts.opportunity: Major viral TikTok – 24.8k likes, 1840 shares. Tag the creator in a reply and consider inviting them back for a behind-the-scenes.

trending_posts.author: Preethi K.
trending_posts.content: Best Costa I've been to. Priya and the team are brilliant. Always get my order right and the baristas chat with you like you're a regular even if you're new.
trending_posts.opportunity: Shout out to manager Priya by name. Share with team.

alerts.title: Viral TikTok – consider influencer follow-up
alerts.description: @readingfoodie's video has 24.8k likes. This is a significant brand moment for Reading Oracle. Recommend escalating to regional marketing team.
alerts.suggested_response: Hey @readingfoodie – this made our whole team's day! 🙌 We'd love to have you back for a proper behind-the-scenes barista session – DM us! ☕

trending_posts.author: @readingstationlife
trending_posts.content: GWR strike today so obviously I'm at Costa Reading Station for the duration ☕📚 Could be here a while. At least the coffee is excellent. #GWRStrike #ReadingStation
trending_posts.opportunity: Positive sentiment despite disruption. Like and reply to build goodwill.

alerts.title: Rail strike sparking social chatter
alerts.description: Multiple posts about GWR strike using Costa as refuge. Mostly positive – engage with warmth.
alerts.suggested_response: We're here for you! ☕ Hope your journey sorts itself out soon. Drop us a message if you need anything while you wait 🙏

trending_posts.author: Mark L.
trending_posts.content: Drive-through was lightning fast this morning – in and out in under 3 minutes. Perfect coffee too. The staff are always cheerful. Best Costa around! ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
trending_posts.opportunity: Shout out drive-through team for speed. Share with store manager Leila.
